narrative:
New Franklin 2-C (precinct in Summit County) has 833 registered voters, with 52.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 26.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 21.1%, a modest Republican lean of 5.3 percentage points.
